_note: A SYNTHETIC v8 run save (the save-layer era, before the R15 backgroundId-on-state field + the secondaryBp journal field + endless escalation). 8->9 is STREAM-BREAKING: a v8 run reconciles against a flatten that now includes backgroundId (and its journal may carry consumable steps without secondaryBp), so it cannot be trusted by the v9 engine. migrateRun(it, 8) MUST throw AbandonRun (docs/06 §3). The actionLog below is a minimal valid v8 journal; the loader never gets past the version gate.
